flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cameron University are 11% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($40.1k vs $45.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 50% at Cameron University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.5k vs 5.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cameron University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.5k → $7.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cameron University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).
